philosophy: Output-first trace compiler — not email generator. No failure moment → do not write.
pipeline: STEP 1: classify domain route — SourceA | Noetfield | TrustField ONLY (else STOP)
STEP 2: load ICP profile — signal · role · their world
STEP 3: FDG — what breaks in front of reviewer? (failure moment)
STEP 4: extract top 3 tensions · rank · select ONE
STEP 5: convert to observable failure scenario (examiner / board / audit)
STEP 7: compose — 1 scenario · 1 pressure · 1 consequence · 1 question
STEP 8: minimal product mapping (1 line) · optional interest asset
STEP 9: validate lane loops (CIL · RIL · OQG for w3_commercial)
STEP 10: RRL — human reaction D/E only (machine sim)
STEP 12: on approve — write output_trace · reverse-engineer rules · machine repeat

primary_output_rule.density: 1 tension · 1 insight · 1 product mention max · 1 question

required_transform.demo: replay of a real workflow scenario

failure_moment_gate.question: What is the moment this breaks in front of a reviewer?

examples.ocree_trustfield: CSA Collaboratory review — each issuance step permitted after the fact
examples.fundmore_noetfield: Board asks what AI copilot did on a mortgage decision six months later
examples.sourcea_fbe: Team ships agent output without reproducible verification built in — drift breaks trust

policy_valid_only_if: compress system to observable business consequence
curiosity question ending (Mode A) or soft offer + link (Mode B)
